name: PM-KISAN
description: ₹6,000 per year to farmer families in 3 installments
how_to_apply: Register at pmkisan.gov.in or nearest CSC centre

name: PMFBY (Crop Insurance)
description: Crop insurance at very low premium. Farmer pays only 1.5 to 5 percent
how_to_apply: Through your bank or visit pmfby.gov.in

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Low interest loan for farming. Only 4 percent interest per year
how_to_apply: Apply at any bank with land records

name: Ayushman Bharat
description: Free hospital treatment up to 5 lakh rupees per year
how_to_apply: Check eligibility at mera.pmjay.gov.in or call 14555

name: Jan Aushadhi
description: Same quality medicines at 50 to 90 percent lower price

name: PM Kusum Solar Pump
description: 60 percent subsidy on solar water pumps for farmers

name: Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG gas connection for poor families
how_to_apply: Apply at nearest gas agency with BPL card

name: PM Awas Yojana
description: Financial help to build pucca house. Up to 1.3 lakh rupees
how_to_apply: Register at pmaymis.gov.in or visit block office
